summary: Backend testing of Tax Planning Bulk Scan & Auto-Deductions CRUD. All 16 tests passed (100% success rate). Verified: POST /api/tax-planning/scan idempotency, GET/PUT/DELETE auto-deductions CRUD, and 3 Visor AI regression tests.
critical_code_review_comments: All Tax Planning Scan and Auto-Deductions CRUD endpoints working correctly
Bulk scan detected 4 deductions from transactions: 80C (PPF, ELSS, Tax Saver) and 80D (Health Insurance)
Idempotency working perfectly - second scan returns 0 new deductions
PUT /api/auto-tax-deductions/{id} correctly updates 'amount' field (uses invested_amount from body → maps to amount in DB)
404 handling correct for non-existent deduction IDs
Visor AI regression: Basic chat, SIP calculator auto-detection, and finance guardrail all working
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account data with actual transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Planning Scan backend fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/tax-planning/scan?fy=2025-26 (bulk scan from transactions, holdings, SIPs, loans - idempotent), GET /api/auto-tax-deductions?fy=2025-26 (returns {fy, sections, total_detected, count}), PUT /api/auto-tax-deductions/{id} (body: {invested_amount: number}), DELETE /api/auto-tax-deductions/{id} (returns {status: 'dismissed'}). Demo account has 4 auto-detected deductions in FY 2025-26 after scan: PPF, ELSS contributions, and health insurance. Visor AI regression verified - SIP calculator, basic chat, finance guardrail all working.

features_verified.POST /api/tax-planning/scan?fy=2025-26 -: PASS - Second scan returned 0 new deductions
features_verified.GET /api/auto-tax-deductions?fy=2025-26: PASS - Returns sections with transactions array, each deduction has id, name, amount, detected_from
features_verified.PUT /api/auto-tax-deductions/{id}: PASS - Updated PPF deduction ₹5,000 → ₹6,000, persisted correctly
features_verified.DELETE /api/auto-tax-deductions/{id}: PASS - Deduction dismissed, count decreased from 4 → 3
features_verified.Visor AI basic chat regression: PASS - Responds in Hinglish with personalized portfolio advice
features_verified.Visor AI SIP calculator regression: PASS - Auto-detects SIP query, returns calculator_result with future_value
features_verified.Visor AI finance guardrail regression: PASS - Non-finance queries redirected to finance topics
